## How to test

```bash
cd examples/<the-folder>
```

## Checklist

- [ ] If I touched an example, its `README.md` is still accurate
- [ ] If I touched a `package.json`, the SDK version is the latest stable on npm
- [ ] No live API keys, PHI, or vendor (LLM/STT/etc.) names in any new code or commit
- [ ] The PR title starts with `[example]`, `[docs]`, or `[meta]`
